Transcript of the Conference call on Q2FY24 results and business updates 
 
Dear Sir, 
 
Pursuant to Regulations 30 and 46 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015, we write to inform you that the transcript of the conference call on Q2FY24 results 
and business updates held on October 30, 2023 is uploaded on the website of the Company and the 
same is available under the tab Investors>>Financial Results>>Financial Statements >> FY 2023 - 
2024 >> Quarter 2 >> Conference Call Transcript at following webpage: 
 
https://www.oberoirealty.com/financial-results 
 
Request you to kindly take note of the above and oblige. 
 
Thanking you. 
 
For Oberoi Realty Limited  
 
 
 
Bhaskar Kshirsagar
